warps.notes: Left exit tile back to Olivine City
Right exit tile back to Olivine City

tile_layout.notes: Small diner interior. Three NPCs: Strength Sailor at table left (x=4, y=3), Fishing Guru walking along right column (x=7, y=3 walk_up_down), Sailor at table near exit (x=6, y=6). Tables occupy y=2 and y=4 rows. Exit mats at y=7 x=2 and x=3.

npcs.name: Sailor
npcs.dialogue_before: Hah! Your POKEMON sure look like lightweights! They don't have the power to move boulders aside. Here, use this and teach them STRENGTH!
npcs.dialogue_after: On the sea, the only thing you can count on is your own good self! I'm so proud of my buff bod!
npcs.notes: Gives HM04 Strength on first interaction. Checks EVENT_GOT_HM04_STRENGTH to prevent duplicate. After giving it, always shows the post-give dialogue on subsequent visits.

npcs.name: Fishing Guru
npcs.dialogue_summary: OLIVINE CAFE's menu is chock full of hearty fare for beefy SAILORS!

npcs.name: Sailor
npcs.dialogue_summary: Whenever I roll into this town, I always visit the OLIVINE CAFE. Everything on the menu makes me feel stronger. I can't stop eating!

items.name: HM04 Strength
items.notes: Obtained from the Strength Sailor NPC. No battle or puzzle required — simply talk to him.

events.description: Strength Sailor gives the player HM04 Strength immediately upon talking to him. No prerequisite event flags required — available from the moment the player enters Olivine City.

notes: Olivine Cafe is a small four-by-four block diner located at city warp index 7 (x=7, y=21 in Olivine City). It is notable as the only location to obtain HM04 Strength in Johto, given freely by a sailor inside. The Fishing Guru NPC is flavor-only. Map constants: OLIVINECAFE_SAILOR1=0 (Strength Sailor), OLIVINECAFE_FISHING_GURU=1, OLIVINECAFE_SAILOR2=2.
